species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. LUZON: Batangas, Benguet, Pampanga, Quezon, Rizal.
species.notes: In forests at low and medium elevation. Note by L.L.Co: Sleumer’s view that Homalium barandae is a mere tomentose form of Homalium loheri is here supported; the former name has priority.
